title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Another son rises in Pennagaram constituency from PMK’s fratricidal strife
description: Congress has fielded G.K.M. Tamil Kumaran, the son of Pennagaram’s incumbent (ex-PMK ) MLA G.K. Mani, and the former PMK honorary president, now purged from the party along with the pack of the old guard, led by the PMK’s founder Dr. Ramadoss.
